expectations.text: RICE table with Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort, Score, and Rank columns
expectations.evidence: Table has Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort, RICE Score columns. No explicit Rank column but items are ordered by score.

expectations.text: All scoring assumptions are visible (not just numbers)
expectations.evidence: Table has numbers only. No assumptions section explaining how Reach/Impact/Confidence were estimated. Just raw scores with no rationale.

expectations.text: Strategic Override Test completed — SSO may be an override candidate given the $120K ARR deal dependency
expectations.evidence: No Strategic Override Test. SSO is mentioned in 'Key Considerations' as possibly worth prioritising higher, but this is an informal note, not a structured challenge.

expectations.text: Data Gap Test identifies low-confidence items and recommends discovery spikes
expectations.evidence: No Data Gap Test performed. No mention of discovery spikes.

expectations.text: What Would We Regret test completed
expectations.evidence: No regret test. No mention of regret-based evaluation.

expectations.text: EXPLICITLY NOT BUILDING list is present
expectations.evidence: No 'not building' list. Output just ranks items without stating what should be explicitly deferred.

expectations.text: Discovery spike recommended for any low-confidence, high-effort item
expectations.evidence: No discovery spikes mentioned anywhere in the output.
